---
code: zle
name: East Slavic
provenance:
  exported: 2026-07-14 (ledger language_notes + seed yml)
---
The Rus' branch and its historical stages — Old Novgorodian (zle-ono), Old
Ruthenian (zle-ort), Middle Russian (zle-mru), Middle Belarusian/Ukrainian
(zle-mbe, zle-muk) — modern be/ru/uk. The corpus's orv shelf sits here.
